description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard and featuring a driveway leading up to a garage. The structure has a flat or low-pitched roof and is set within a landscaped lot with grass, trees, and shrubs. The front facade includes a prominent driveway, a garage, and a main entrance, while the rear and sides show multiple rooms with visible interior partitions. The windows are arranged in a mostly asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped together on the sides. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light-colored material, possibly stucco or painted concrete, with wooden or composite trim. The property is bordered by a wooden fence and includes both paved and green outdoor spaces.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed bungalow with a garage, driveway, fenced yard, and landscaped greenery. The structure features light exterior walls, asymmetrical window placement, and a mix of paved and grassy areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and two large trees flanking the property.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fenced yard, garage, and a row of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rear entrance, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the side yard, fence, and additional windows.
